working_on: Close Issues #143/#144/#145 — three Tier-A in-context fixes for the action-needed soft-warn lane (cross_reference_broken + adr_consequences_deliverable_audit + timestamp_helper_bypass)
declared_scope: Edit product/docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md:49 to re-point the retired mempalace-operations.md link to engine-memory-operations.md (Issue #143). Edit engine/adr/0045-shared-state-integrity-discipline.md and engine/adr/0079-hnsw-sync-threshold-tuning.md Consequences sections to convert retired-file deliverable pointers (backtick/link form) to plain prose with retirement annotations citing ADR 0091, ending the audit-trigger on S-0193-demolished files (Issue #144). Edit engine/tools/scan_engine_memory_citations.py:92-95 + line 192 to route date-only generation through the canonical timestamps.today() helper per ADR 0058 (Issue #145). Verify validate.py reports zero counts for the three soft-warn categories before commit; close all three Issues via gh with commit-sha comments. phase: NA-engine-cleanup
outcome_summary: Three Tier-A in-context fixes closed Issues #143/#144/#145 (cross_reference_broken, adr_consequences_deliverable_audit, timestamp_helper_bypass) in one fix-commit each. All three target soft-warns dropped from 1/2/1 peak to 0/0/0 final — the S-0196 split's action-needed lane is now empty per ADR 0042 / ADR 0091. Plan ~/.claude/plans/we-need-to-close-quirky-bird.md executed exactly; GitHub auto-closed all three Issues via the Closes #N footers when 1cd2d8e landed on origin/main, then sha-attribution comments via gh issue comment preserved the closure-context audit trail.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — all three fixes (CROSS_REFERENCES.md re-point, ADR 0045 + 0079 retired-deliverable conversions, scan_engine_memory_citations.py timestamp routing) landed exactly as the approved plan described; the three soft-warn counts moved from 1/2/1 → 0/0/0 on the post-fix validate runs; all three Issues closed via the Closes #N footers + sha-attribution gh comments.
